chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-6152 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.27316/2024 (Exemption) 2. For hearing of main case 03.11.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- On the first date of hearing i.e. 16.12.2024, none was present for the petitioner without intimation. On the next date of hearing being 07.10.2025, the petitioner was complete unprepared and the urgent application was dismissed. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
